---
Name: Milestone Issue Template
About: the TLDR overview of what you are responsible for 

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. I'm always frustrated when...)

## Milestone [give descriptive name here]
A clear and concise description of what you want part of the feature you are working. How does this milestone connect to the overall  feature?

## User Stories 
A clear and concise description of any user stories that you are  assigned to. Please make each user story a checkbox in markdown 

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here. 

## Dependancies 
Do you need to any any dependencies to get this work done?
